description: SLA deadline and warning configuration for BPM processes
semantic_description: Service Level Agreement configuration defining deadline and warning rules for BPM process targets. Answers: what SLA milestones apply to which process types, and when should warnings trigger?
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — master configuration reference.

description: BPM domain configuration for process grouping and field display
semantic_description: BPM domain configuration specifying which process keys belong to a domain, and which fields are visible in list / filter / sort. Answers: which fields should be displayed for which business domain's processes?
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — master configuration reference.

description: Row-level and column-level data permission policies
semantic_description: Row-level and column-level data permission policy enforcing scope (department / user / custom expression) and masking rules. Answers: who can see which data fields, and how should values be masked if visible?
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — policy master data.

description: Webhook subscriptions triggered by platform events
semantic_description: Webhook subscription configuration specifying target URL, event trigger, authentication secret, and retry policy. Answers: which external systems should be notified of which platform events, and how?
lifecycle_description: ACTIVE ↔ INACTIVE (通过 enabled 字段切换;无删除前的 ARCHIVED 转迁)

description: Delivery attempt logs for webhook subscriptions
semantic_description: Delivery attempt log for webhook event notifications: timestamp, status, response code, error message, retry count. Answers: was this webhook invocation successful, and if not, why?
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — audit log entry (immutable once written).

semantic_description: External API connector configuration capturing base URL, authentication type, default headers, timeout and retry policy. Answers: which external APIs can workflows invoke, and under what terms?
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — integration master data.

description: Tenant member management with status workflow
semantic_description: Tenant member record tracking user identity, role assignment, and membership status within organization. Answers: who belongs to this tenant, what permissions do they have, and are they currently active?
lifecycle_description: PENDING → ACTIVE / REJECTED (approve_member / reject_member) → ACTIVE → SUSPENDED (suspend_member) → SUSPENDED / REJECTED → ACTIVE (restore_member);ACTIVE → INACTIVE (leave_member);DELETE via delete_member command

semantic_description: Configurable background task definition specifying trigger (cron / interval), target handler bean/method, retry policy, and execution timeout. Answers: which recurring or delayed operations should execute automatically, with what frequency and constraints?
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — task definition reference (enabled/disabled via enabled field, not state transition).

description: BPM process definition management (data from dedicated BPM API)
semantic_description: BPM process definition metadata retrieved from dedicated BPM engine API (not persisted to relational table). Answers: which workflow templates exist in the system, with what name and process key?
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — read-only metadata from BPM engine (skipTableCreation: true).

description: Dashboard management (data from dedicated dashboard API)
semantic_description: Dashboard definition metadata retrieved from dedicated dashboard API (not persisted to relational table). Manages publication, versioning, and designer state. Answers: which dashboards exist, who can access them, and which are currently published?
lifecycle_description: No status lifecycle — read-only metadata from dashboard engine (skipTableCreation: true).
